offer: For freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month, inconsistent financial reporting causes cash flow gaps. We automate monthly financial statements instead of manual spreadsheet tracking.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for QuickBooks freelancers
Engage in Indie Hackers discussions about financial tools
Direct message 20-50 freelancers with demo video
Participate in forums for freelancers sharing tools
try_it: Let users try template-based financial statement generation for 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
